frontmatter.description: Two services on incompatible versions are interacting (client too new, server too old, or vice versa)

signature.embedding_seed: version skew api contract incompatible client server

body:
## When this fires
A caller and a callee are on versions that disagree about the wire contract — a field was added, removed, or renamed, and one side is still running the old binary.

## Playbook
1. Pull service-version-matrix to confirm which two builds are talking.
2. Read api-contract-diff to see what changed between those builds.
3. Search tickets-similar-skew for the canonical resolution (usually: roll forward the laggard or revert the contract change).

## Common confusion
This is *not* [[deploy-rollback-required]] (a fresh deploy itself failed) and *not* [[deploy-config-drift]] (config, not code, has drifted).
